languages.text: "Не знаю, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Но уверен, что без Инквизиции здесь не обошлось. Выскрести из истории неудобные события — несомненно, их почерк. Пожалуй, Священные Ордосы оказали нам услугу, стерев осаду Даргонуса из истории, ведь вместе с их поражением они предали забвению и мои прегрешения".

"I do not know, heir. But I am certain the Inquisition was involved. Scrubbing inconvenient events from history is undoubtedly their handiwork. Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."
languages.original_text: "Не знаю, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Но уверен, что без Инквизиции здесь не обошлось. Выскрести из истории неудобные события — несомненно, их почерк. Пожалуй, Священные Ордосы оказали нам услугу, стерев осаду Даргонуса из истории, ведь вместе с их поражением они предали забвению и мои прегрешения".

Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

languages.text: "Ich weiß es nicht, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Aber ich bin sicher, die Inquisition war involviert. Unerfreuliche Ereignisse aus der Geschichte zu tilgen, ist eindeutig ihre Handschrift. Vielleicht haben uns die Heiligen Ordos einen Gefallen getan, als sie die Belagerung von Dargonus aus den Aufzeichnungen löschten, denn neben ihrer Niederlage überlieferten sie auch meine Sünden gegen die Vergessenheit."
languages.original_text: "I do not know, heir. But I am certain the Inquisition was involved. Scrubbing inconvenient events from history is undoubtedly their handiwork. Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß es nicht, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Aber ich bin sicher, die Inquisition war involviert. Unerfreuliche Ereignisse aus der Geschichte zu tilgen, ist eindeutig ihre Handschrift. Vielleicht haben uns die Heiligen Ordos einen Gefallen getan, als sie die Belagerung von Dargonus aus den Aufzeichnungen löschten, denn neben ihrer Niederlage überlieferten sie auch meine Sünden gegen die Vergessenheit."

languages.text: « Je l'ignore, mais à n'en pas douter, l'Inquisition a joué un rôle dans la question. Ses membres sont passés maîtres dans l'art de faire oublier les événements qui ne les montrent pas sous leur meilleur jour. Mais le Saint Ordo nous a aussi peut-être rendu service en effaçant le siège de Dargonus des annales, puisqu'en faisant disparaître leur défaite, ils ont aussi condamné mes transgressions à l'oubli. »
languages.original_text: "I do not know, heir. But I am certain the Inquisition was involved. Scrubbing inconvenient events from history is undoubtedly their handiwork. Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

traits.locale_text: « Je l'ignore, mais à n'en pas douter, l'Inquisition a joué un rôle dans la question. Ses membres sont passés maîtres dans l'art de faire oublier les événements qui ne les montrent pas sous leur meilleur jour. Mais le Saint Ordo nous a aussi peut-être rendu service en effaçant le siège de Dargonus des annales, puisqu'en faisant disparaître leur défaite, ils ont aussi condamné mes transgressions à l'oubli. »

languages.text: «No lo sé, hereder{mf|o|a}, pero estoy convencido de que la Inquisición tuvo algo que ver. La desaparición de los sucesos incómodos de la historia es obra suya, de eso no cabe duda. Tal vez los Santos Ordos nos hicieran un favor al purgar los registros del asedio de Dargonus. Junto con su derrota, eliminaron todo rastro de mis transgresiones».
languages.original_text: "I do not know, heir. But I am certain the Inquisition was involved. Scrubbing inconvenient events from history is undoubtedly their handiwork. Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

traits.locale_text: «No lo sé, hereder{mf|o|a}, pero estoy convencido de que la Inquisición tuvo algo que ver. La desaparición de los sucesos incómodos de la historia es obra suya, de eso no cabe duda. Tal vez los Santos Ordos nos hicieran un favor al purgar los registros del asedio de Dargonus. Junto con su derrota, eliminaron todo rastro de mis transgresiones».

languages.text: "Bilmiyorum vâris. Ancak Engizisyon'un işin içinde olduğundan eminim. Rahatsız edici olayları tarihten silmek şüphesiz onların işidir. Belki de Kutsal Nizam, Dargonus kuşatmasını kayıtlardan silerek bize iyilik etmiştir. Zira yenilgileriyle birlikte suçlarım da unutulmaya yüz tuttu."
languages.original_text: "I do not know, heir. But I am certain the Inquisition was involved. Scrubbing inconvenient events from history is undoubtedly their handiwork. Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

traits.locale_text: "Bilmiyorum vâris. Ancak Engizisyon'un işin içinde olduğundan eminim. Rahatsız edici olayları tarihten silmek şüphesiz onların işidir. Belki de Kutsal Nizam, Dargonus kuşatmasını kayıtlardan silerek bize iyilik etmiştir. Zira yenilgileriyle birlikte suçlarım da unutulmaya yüz tuttu."

languages.text: “我也不知道，继承人。但我可以肯定审判庭插了一手。将不方便记载的事件从历史中抹去，无疑出自他们的手笔。也许审判庭从记录中抹掉达戈努斯之围，反倒帮了我们一个忙，因为在抹去他们败绩的同时，也一并埋葬了我的越界行为。”
languages.original_text: "I do not know, heir. But I am certain the Inquisition was involved. Scrubbing inconvenient events from history is undoubtedly their handiwork. Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

traits.locale_text: “我也不知道，继承人。但我可以肯定审判庭插了一手。将不方便记载的事件从历史中抹去，无疑出自他们的手笔。也许审判庭从记录中抹掉达戈努斯之围，反倒帮了我们一个忙，因为在抹去他们败绩的同时，也一并埋葬了我的越界行为。”

languages.text: 「わからない、後継者。だが、宗教裁判所が関与していたことは確実だ。都合の悪い出来事を歴史から抹消するのは、彼らの手仕事である。聖オールドスがダゴヌス包囲の記録を消したことは、彼らに敗北を喫したのと同時に、私の罪も忘れ去られたことを意味しているかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "I do not know, heir. But I am certain the Inquisition was involved. Scrubbing inconvenient events from history is undoubtedly their handiwork. Perhaps the Holy Ordos did us a service by erasing the siege of Dargonus from the records, for along with their defeat, they also consigned my transgressions to oblivion."

traits.locale_text: 「わからない、後継者。だが、宗教裁判所が関与していたことは確実だ。都合の悪い出来事を歴史から抹消するのは、彼らの手仕事である。聖オールドスがダゴヌス包囲の記録を消したことは、彼らに敗北を喫したのと同時に、私の罪も忘れ去られたことを意味しているかもしれない。」
